name: The Case of the Golden Idol
summary: An incredibly challenging yet charming detective game where you feel super duper sm0rt when you deduce things. So unique and so well made!
pros: Like actually difficult, requires actual brain usage, requires actual slow thinking
Unique one of a kind game IMO
The fact that almost every single thing is important makes it so cool
cons: Needed better keyboard accessibility. Was tired of clicking through things again and again with mouse.
